description: Real estate: property sales, development, commercial, investment

items.name: Property staging + virtual tours
items.tactic: Good staging = +10-15% price. Virtual tour = 70% qualified buyers. 3D walkthroughs = highest engagement.

items.name: Investor pitch (development)
items.tactic: Show: location analysis, comp analysis, ROI model, market trends, risk mitigation. Investor wants: 15-25% IRR + downside protection.

items.name: Negotiation tactics (real estate)
items.tactic: Anchor with listing price. Comps prove value. Home inspection = negotiation tool. Financing contingency = leverage.
